compliance.notes: Show only the licence(s) relevant to the configured trade. Never invent a licence number — leave the TODO in site-config until provided. Warranty terms where stated.

template.subject: Thanks for reaching out to {{businessName}}
template.html:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks for getting in touch with {{businessName}} about your {{intentLabel}}. We've logged it and a real person will follow up shortly to confirm details and a service window.

If it's urgent, call us directly at {{businessPhone}}.

{{signature}}

{{caslLine}} Unsubscribe.

template.subject: How did we do? A quick favour from {{businessName}}
template.html:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks again for choosing {{businessName}}. If we did right by you, a quick public review helps your neighbours find a trade they can trust — it takes under a minute.

Leave a review

If anything fell short, reply to this email first — we'd rather make it right than have you tell the internet.

{{signature}}

{{caslLine}} Unsubscribe.

invoice.repurposedAs: deposit on booking + balance on completion

template.subject: Reminder: invoice {{invoiceNumber}} from {{businessName}}
template.html:
Hi {{firstName}},

A friendly reminder that invoice {{invoiceNumber}} for {{invoiceAmount}} is now {{daysOverdue}} day(s) past due.

You can settle it any time. If you've already paid, thank you — please ignore this note. Questions? Just reply.

{{signature}}

{{caslLine}} Unsubscribe.
